chief_complaint: A 32-year-old woman presented for an 18 F-FDG PET/CT scan for a lung nodule.
history: Incidentally, there was a focus of moderate-to-intense uptake in the right lung with no CT correlate. Repeat imaging 55 minutes later demonstrated resolution of this uptake, confirming a diagnosis of iatrogenic FDG-embolus, or 'hot-clot' artifact.
exam: No specific physical examination findings were reported.
labs: PET/CT scan with 18 F-FDG, initial and delayed imaging.
